metadata.objective: Build comprehensive lead tracking across all touchpoints (form submissions, voice AI, cold outreach, social media) with source attribution, CRM integration, and conversion optimization to prevent leads from falling through cracks

stories.title: Build unified lead intake system with source tracking
stories.description: Create centralized lead_intake.json that captures ALL lead sources (form submissions, voice AI calls, SMS replies, social media engagement) with source attribution fields. Each lead gets unique ID, timestamp, source channel, business_id, and status tracking.
acceptance_criteria: output/lead_intake.json schema: {lead_id, timestamp, business_id, source_channel, source_detail, contact_info, status, crm_synced}
source_channel enum: ['form_submission', 'voice_ai_call', 'sms_reply', 'social_media_click', 'direct_inquiry', 'referral']
source_detail captures: UTM params for forms, campaign_id for SMS, post_id for social, call_sid for voice AI
Status tracking: new -> contacted -> qualified -> converted -> won/lost
Deduplication: Same phone/email within 30 days = update existing lead, don't create duplicate

integration_points.social_media: UTM tracking on social posts -> form submission includes utm_source=twitter/linkedin/facebook

stories.title: Implement UTM parameter tracking for source attribution
stories.description: Add UTM tracking to ALL outbound links (cold outreach SMS, social media posts, voice AI follow-ups) so form submissions can be traced back to exact source. Parse UTM params from form submissions and store in lead_intake.
acceptance_criteria: UTM structure: utm_source (sms/social/voice), utm_medium (cold_outreach/organic/paid), utm_campaign (campaign_id), utm_content (template_name/post_id)
All SMS templates updated with UTM-tracked links: 'Visit marceausolutions.com/demo?utm_source=sms&utm_campaign=no_website_jan20&utm_content=intro'
Social media scheduler generates UTM links: 'marceausolutions.com?utm_source=twitter&utm_campaign=ai_automation_jan20&utm_content=post_123'
Form submission handler extracts UTM params from referrer or URL
Voice AI scripts include tracked links: 'I'll text you a link: [URL with utm_source=voice]'
python -m src.utm_tracker report -> shows: 50% leads from SMS, 30% social, 20% voice AI
files_to_modify: templates/sms/*.json (add UTM params to all links)

stories.title: Build form submission tracking across all 3 business websites
stories.description: Ensure form submissions for marceau-solutions, swflorida-hvac, square-foot-shipping all flow into lead_intake.json with proper business_id tagging. Parse UTM params, deduplicate, and trigger CRM sync.
acceptance_criteria: Google Sheets webhooks configured for all 3 businesses (or unified form handler)
Form handler extracts: name, email, phone, message, utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content, business_id
Deduplication: Check if phone/email exists in lead_intake.json within last 30 days
If duplicate: Update existing lead with new touchpoint (append to history)
If new: Create lead with status='new', trigger CRM sync
python -m src.form_tracker report --business marceau-solutions -> shows form submissions by source
stories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Review unified intake, UTM tracking, form submissions before CRM/voice AI integration

stories.title: Integrate voice AI call tracking with lead intake
stories.description: When voice AI call completes (Twilio webhook), capture call as lead in lead_intake.json. Track: caller phone, business called, call outcome (appointment booked, callback requested, question answered, not interested), call recording SID.
acceptance_criteria: Twilio webhook: call.completed -> lead_intake.add_lead(source='voice_ai_call', phone=caller, business_id=called_business)
Call outcomes tracked: appointment_booked, callback_requested, info_only, not_interested, wrong_number
If appointment booked or callback requested -> status='hot_lead', priority='high', trigger CRM sync immediately
Link to call recording: Store call_sid, generate URL to Twilio recording
python -m src.voice_ai_tracker report -> shows: 47 calls, 12 appointments, 8 callbacks, conversion rate

voice_ai_outcomes.appointment_booked: Hot lead - sync to CRM immediately, status='converted'
voice_ai_outcomes.callback_requested: Warm lead - add to follow-up queue, status='qualified'
voice_ai_outcomes.info_only: Cold lead - add to nurture sequence, status='contacted'

stories.title: Track social media campaign leads (ready for HVAC + Shipping)
stories.description: Build social media lead tracking for all 3 businesses (marceau already posting, HVAC and shipping ready but not launched). Track: clicks from social posts -> website visits -> form submissions. Ready to activate for swflorida-hvac and square-foot-shipping when campaigns launch.
acceptance_criteria: Social post scheduler generates UTM-tracked links for ALL 3 businesses
Link shortener (bit.ly or custom) tracks clicks per post
python -m src.social_media_tracker clicks --business swflorida-hvac -> shows click data (ready for when campaign starts)
Form submissions with utm_source=twitter/linkedin/facebook tagged as social media leads
python -m src.social_media_tracker conversion-rate -> shows: clicks vs form fills per business
Report shows: 'swflorida-hvac: 0 posts (campaign not started), square-foot-shipping: 0 posts (ready to launch)'

businesses.marceau-solutions: ACTIVE - currently posting 25x/day with UTM tracking
businesses.swflorida-hvac: READY - templates exist, scheduler configured, waiting to launch
businesses.square-foot-shipping: READY - templates exist, scheduler configured, waiting to launch

stories.title: Build CRM sync automation (ClickUp integration)
stories.description: Auto-sync qualified leads to ClickUp CRM. Rules: Hot leads (voice AI appointments, callback requests, form submissions with 'urgent' keyword) sync immediately. Warm/cold leads sync daily batch. Prevent duplicates.
acceptance_criteria: ClickUp API integration: Create task in 'Leads' list when lead status = 'qualified' or 'hot_lead'
Task fields: Lead name, phone, email, source (SMS/Voice/Social/Form), business_id, UTM campaign, priority
Deduplication: Check ClickUp for existing task with same phone/email before creating
If exists in ClickUp: Add comment with new touchpoint ('Lead responded to SMS campaign X')
python -m src.crm_sync sync --dry-run -> shows what would sync
python -m src.crm_sync sync --for-real -> syncs qualified leads to ClickUp
Sync log: output/crm_sync_log.json tracks all syncs to prevent duplicates

sync_rules.hot_lead: Immediate sync (voice AI appointment, callback request, form 'urgent' keyword)

stories.notes: CHECKPOINT: Review lead intake, tracking, and CRM integration before analytics/reporting

stories.title: Build lead attribution analytics and reporting
stories.description: Comprehensive reporting on lead sources, conversion rates, and attribution. Answer: Which channel drives most qualified leads? What's conversion rate per source? Are we missing leads anywhere?
acceptance_criteria: python -m src.lead_analytics report -> shows all-time stats by source
Metrics per source: Total leads, Qualified %, Converted %, Avg time to conversion
Funnel visualization: Source -> Contact -> Qualified -> Converted
Attribution report: 'SMS: 50 leads (60% qualified, 20% converted), Voice AI: 30 leads (80% qualified, 40% converted), Social: 20 leads (40% qualified, 10% converted)'
Multi-touch attribution: If lead came from SMS, then called voice AI, then filled form -> credit all 3 touchpoints
Identifies gaps: 'Warning: 15 voice AI calls with no follow-up action (potential lost leads)'

reports.source_performance: Which channel is best? (conversion rate, quality)
reports.business_comparison: marceau vs hvac vs shipping lead quality
reports.lost_lead_detection: Leads that went cold (no activity in 14 days)

stories.title: Build lead gap detection and alert system
stories.description: Automated system to detect leads falling through cracks: No follow-up within 24 hours, no CRM sync after 48 hours, voice AI callback requested but not scheduled, form submission with no outreach. Alert William via SMS/email.
acceptance_criteria: Daily scan of lead_intake.json for gaps
Gap types: 'No follow-up within 24h', 'Hot lead not in CRM', 'Callback requested 3 days ago (not scheduled)', 'Form submit - no contact attempt'
python -m src.lead_gap_detector scan -> shows all current gaps
Alert system: If critical gap (hot lead not followed up), send SMS to William: 'ALERT: Hot lead from voice AI (appointment request) - not in CRM - 48 hours old'
Weekly report: 'Prevented 5 leads from falling through cracks this week'
Auto-remediation (optional): If callback requested but not scheduled -> add to ClickUp with HIGH priority

alert_rules.critical: Hot lead >24h old, not in CRM -> SMS + Email alert
alert_rules.high: Qualified lead >48h old, no follow-up -> Email alert
alert_rules.medium: Cold lead >7 days old, no activity -> Daily digest
alert_rules.low: Lead >30 days old, never converted -> Archive recommendation

data_sources.lead_intake.json: Unified lead database - all sources flow here
data_sources.crm_sync_log.json: Track what's been synced to ClickUp (prevent duplicates)
data_sources.form_submissions.json: Raw form data from Google Sheets

deduplication_strategy.time_window: 30 days - if same contact within 30 days, update existing lead
deduplication_strategy.multi_touch: Append new touchpoints to lead history array

utm_parameter_standards.utm_source: sms, twitter, linkedin, facebook, voice, email, referral

crm_integration.sync_frequency: Hot leads: immediate, Qualified: daily 9 AM, Cold: manual

business_separation.swflorida-hvac: HVAC services (social media ready, not launched)
business_separation.square-foot-shipping: Logistics services (social media ready, not launched)

success_metrics.lead_capture_rate: 100% of leads from all channels captured in lead_intake.json
success_metrics.crm_sync_rate: >95% of qualified leads synced within 24 hours
success_metrics.attribution_accuracy: Can trace 100% of leads back to source channel
success_metrics.gap_detection: <1% of leads fall through cracks (missed follow-ups)
success_metrics.conversion_lift: +15% conversion rate from better lead management
